old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-3uw.1","title":"Codify ai-harness doctrine and cleanup contract","description":"Write down the opinionated product doctrine for ai-harness: Beads, GSD, Codex, and OpenCode are the foundation; src/templates/** is canonical; existing repos preserve user files by default; and non-harness AI workflow droppings are only removed through curated manifests. Update the project and planning docs so later cleanup and doctor work has a stable contract to follow.","acceptance_criteria":"The doctrine clearly states what ai-harness installs, what it removes, what it preserves, and which files are the source of truth for dogfooded updates.","spec_id":"phase-2-self-hosted-harness-rollout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:03Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:03Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-3uw.2","title":"Expand curated cleanup manifests for legacy AI workflow droppings","description":"Inventory the non-harness AI workflow leftovers we already know how to reason about, then extend curated cleanup manifests so existing-repo adoption can remove them safely. Keep the scope explicit: legacy wrappers, duplicate planning systems, deprecated assistant runtime files, and other known artifacts that conflict with the ai-harness foundation.","acceptance_criteria":"Curated manifest entries cover the known legacy droppings we want removed, and tests prove they are removed only when explicitly requested.","spec_id":"phase-2-self-hosted-harness-rollout","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"natem12@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:09Z","created_by":"ndmikkelsen","updated_at":"2026-03-29T17:42:09Z"}

old_value: {"id":"ai-harness-3uw.4","title":"Teach doctor to flag deprecated AI workflow artifacts","description":"Improve ai-harness doctor so it can spot deprecated or conflicting workflow artifacts that should not survive alongside the harness foundation.
